frontmatter.title: 練習問題メモ 18（表現行列）

children.html: a1,a2,a3∈R3、b1,b2∈R2 を a1=(012),a2=(103),a3=(230),b1=(12),b2=(34)\begin{aligned} & \boldsymbol{a}_1, \boldsymbol{a}_2, \boldsymbol{a}_3 \in \mathbb{R}^3 、 \boldsymbol{b}_1, \boldsymbol{b}_2 \in \mathbb{R}^2 \text { を } \\ & \boldsymbol{a}_1=\left(\begin{array}{l} 0 \\ 1 \\ 2 \end{array}\right), \boldsymbol{a}_2=\left(\begin{array}{l} 1 \\ 0 \\ 3 \end{array}\right), \boldsymbol{a}_3=\left(\begin{array}{l} 2 \\ 3 \\ 0 \end{array}\right), \boldsymbol{b}_1=\binom{1}{2}, \boldsymbol{b}_2=\binom{3}{4} \end{aligned}​a1​,a2​,a3​∈R3、b1​,b2​∈R2 を a1​=⎝⎛​012​⎠⎞​,a2​=⎝⎛​103​⎠⎞​,a3​=⎝⎛​230​⎠⎞​,b1​=(21​),b2​=(43​)​

children.value: の基底である。線形写像

PPP

(f(a1)f(a2)f(a3))=(b1b2)P\begin{pmatrix}f(\boldsymbol{a}_1) & f(\boldsymbol{a}_2) & f(\boldsymbol{a}_3)\end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix}\boldsymbol{b}_1 & \boldsymbol{b}_2\end{pmatrix} P(f(a1​)​f(a2​)​f(a3​)​)=(b1​​b2​​)P
PPP
(f(a1)f(a2)f(a3))\begin{pmatrix}f(\boldsymbol{a}_1) & f(\boldsymbol{a}_2) & f(\boldsymbol{a}_3)\end{pmatrix}(f(a1​)​f(a2​)​f(a3​)​)

f(a1)=(103020)(012)=(62)f(a2)=(100)f(a3)=(26)f(\boldsymbol{a}_1) = \left(\begin{array}{lll} 1 & 0 & 3 \\ 0 & 2 & 0 \end{array}\right) \begin{pmatrix}0 \\ 1\\ 2\end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix}6 \\ 2\end{pmatrix} \\ f(\boldsymbol{a}_2) = \begin{pmatrix}10 \\ 0\end{pmatrix} \\ f(\boldsymbol{a}_3) = \begin{pmatrix}2 \\ 6\end{pmatrix}f(a1​)=(10​02​30​)⎝⎛​012​⎠⎞​=(62​)f(a2​)=(100​)f(a3​)=(26​)

(f(a1)f(a2)f(a3))=(b1b2)P  ⟺  (6102206)=(1324)P\begin{pmatrix}f(\boldsymbol{a}_1) & f(\boldsymbol{a}_2) & f(\boldsymbol{a}_3)\end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix}\boldsymbol{b}_1 & \boldsymbol{b}_2\end{pmatrix} P \\ \iff \begin{pmatrix} 6& 10 & 2\\ 2 & 0 & 6 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} 1 & 3\\ 2 & 4 \end{pmatrix} P(f(a1​)​f(a2​)​f(a3​)​)=(b1​​b2​​)P⟺(62​100​26​)=(12​34​)P
PPP
B:=(1324)B:= \begin{pmatrix} 1 & 3\\ 2 & 4 \end{pmatrix}B:=(12​34​)

children.value: の逆行列を求める。拡大係数行列を

children.html: (B∣E)=(13102401)(B | E) = \left(\begin{array}{cc|cc} 1 & 3 & 1 & 0\\ 2 & 4 & 0 & 1 \end{array}\right)(B∣E)=(12​34​10​01​)

B−1=(−2321−12)B^{-1}= \left(\begin{array}{cc} -2 & \frac{3}{2}\\ 1 & -\frac{1}{2} \end{array}\right)B−1=(−21​23​−21​​)

children.html: B−1(6102206)=B−1(1324)PB^{-1} \begin{pmatrix} 6& 10 & 2\\ 2 & 0 & 6 \end{pmatrix} = B^{-1} \begin{pmatrix} 1 & 3\\ 2 & 4 \end{pmatrix} PB−1(62​100​26​)=B−1(12​34​)P

(−2321−12)(6102206)=(−9−205510−1)=P\begin{pmatrix} -2 & \frac{3}{2}\\ 1 & -\frac{1}{2} \end{pmatrix} \begin{pmatrix} 6& 10 & 2\\ 2 & 0 & 6 \end{pmatrix} = \begin{pmatrix} -9 & -20 & 5\\ 5 & 10 & -1 \end{pmatrix} = P(−21​23​−21​​)(62​100​26​)=(−95​−2010​5−1​)=P

children.value:
import numpy as np

A = np.array([
    [-2, 3/2],
    [1, -1/2],
])

B = np.array([
    [6, 10, 2],
    [2, 0 , 6]
])


A @ B

children.html: f(aj)=∑i=1maijbi(j=1,2,⋯ ,n)f\left(\boldsymbol{a}_j\right)=\sum_{i=1}^m a_{i j} \boldsymbol{b}_i \quad(j=1,2, \cdots, n)f(aj​)=i=1∑m​aij​bi​(j=1,2,⋯,n)

g∘f(aj)=g(f(aj))(合成写像の定義より)=g(∑i=1maijbi)=∑i=1maijg(bi)(gが線形写像のため)\begin{aligned} g\circ f(a_j) &= g(f(a_j)) \quad (合成写像の定義より)\\ &= g(\sum_{i=1}^m a_{i j} \boldsymbol{b}_i) \\ &= \sum_{i=1}^m a_{i j} g(\boldsymbol{b}_i) \quad (gが線形写像のため)\\ \end{aligned}g∘f(aj​)​=g(f(aj​))(合成写像の定義より)=g(i=1∑m​aij​bi​)=i=1∑m​aij​g(bi​)(gが線形写像のため)​
